sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109073" key="u(po/rrusos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόρρῡσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather wrinkled,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βλαστήματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.42</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
